narrative:
Etna Township D (precinct in Licking County) has 1,925 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.8 percentage points.
